name: Creole Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. For the white sauce: In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add flour and whisk until smooth. Gradually add milk while whisking constantly to avoid lumps. Stir in salt and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes or until thickened.
2. For the tomato sauce: In another saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add chopped onion and green peppers, stirring occasionally until softened. Add mashed garlic clove and canned tomatoes. Stir in chili powder. Simmer for 10-15 minutes until flavors meld together.
3. To serve, place a spoonful of white sauce on each plate or bowl.
4. Crack an egg into the white sauce and gently stir to incorporate it.
5. Cook the eggs as desired (scrambled, sunny-side up, etc.).
6. Garnish with additional chopped green peppers if desired.
7. Serve immediately.
